name: bare-text-fallback: a final bare-text result delivers to the originating channel
description: Many models emit their final answer as bare text after a tool-call chain (no <message to=...> wrapper). With a single destination, the poll-loop's reply-source fallback must deliver that bare text back to the inbound channel rather than dropping it to the scratchpad.
agentResponse: You're welcome — glad I could help.
